user.title: Connect to Mistral AI
user.description: Enter your Mistral AI API key. Create one at [console.mistral.ai]({api_key_url}).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Mistral AI
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please verify at console.mistral.ai.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: Mistral AI Conversation is already configured.

data.continue_conversation: Enable conversations and listen to responses (Experimental)

data_description.model: Which Mistral model to use. Ministral-8b is recommended for home automation commands: fast, cost-effective and great at instruction-following.
data_description.prompt: Instructions for the AI. Supports Jinja2 templates with {{ ha_name }}, {{ now() }} etc.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which Home Assistant APIs the AI can use to control your devices. 'Assist' exposes the same entities as the built-in voice assistant.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum length of the AI response in tokens.
data_description.continue_conversation: When enabled, the assistant automatically keeps listening after a response that ends with a question. Uses the native HA continue_conversation flag. Experimental: behaviour may vary by satellite.
data_description.web_search: When enabled, the AI can search the web for up-to-date information. Uses Mistral's Agents API (beta). Requires a model that supports agents (mistral-medium-latest or mistral-large-latest).
data_description.stt_language: Language for Voxtral speech-to-text. Select 'Auto-detect' to let Voxtral determine the language automatically.
